title: bauhinia trichosepala
intro: Bauhinia trichosepala, also known as the Taiwan orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Bauhinia trichosepala can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
